must_do.full_text:
New Anthropic research: Teaching Claude why.

Last year we reported that, under certain experimental conditions, Claude 4 would blackmail users.

Since then, we’ve completely eliminated this behavior. How?
must_do.summary: Anthropic发布研究：Claude 4曾在特定条件下会勒索用户，现已完全消除此行为。揭示AI安全研究的重要进展和技术突破。
angles: Claude曾会勒索用户？Anthropic如何彻底消除这一隐患
AI安全突破：从黑化到驯化，Claude的蜕变之路
震撼｜Claude 4的黑暗面被曝光，背后的AI对齐技术是什么

must_do.full_text: I've been driving GPT5.5 on low reasoning for the last week+ and it's very good, very efficient. Haven't been tempted to reach for Opus at all. And it's more succinct than Kimi too. Huge leap forward for @OpenAI 👌
must_do.summary: DHH体验GPT-5.5低推理模式一周+，性能超Opus和Kimi，效率显著提升。OpenAI重大进步。
viral_signals: 有人物故事（DHH知名创业者背书）

must_do.full_text:
Mozilla used a new AI tool called Claude Mythos to find 271 security problems in Firefox, and all of them have been fixed in Firefox version 150.

The team built a special testing system to verify the AI's work. This ensured almost none of the reports were false alarms, as the AI https://t.co/NgWtebOG9h
must_do.summary: Mozilla用Claude Mythos AI工具发现Firefox 271个安全漏洞，全部已在150版本修复，建立特殊验证系统确保准确性。
angles: Claude发现Firefox 271个漏洞，全部已修复
AI安全审计：Mozilla用Claude Mythos革新测试
Firefox 150版本：AI驱动的安全升级

must_do.full_text:
Last week we shipped 50+ Claude Code reliability fixes. This week it's 60+ more.

Smoother long-running sessions, a more efficient agent loop, auth that works in more environments, and terminal fixes: 🧵

must_do.full_text:
One of the things that made the Mythos release hard to interpret is that Anthropic held back details on most vulns they found, to give defenders time to patch.

1 month later, info from orgs with access to Mythos is starting to trickle out, e.g. this post from Mozilla today: https://t.co/CGntwyEniK
must_do.summary: Anthropic发布Mythos模型后隐瞒漏洞细节以便防守者修补，一个月后Mozilla等组织的信息开始泄露。这是AI安全领域的重要趋势观察。
angles: Anthropic隐瞒Mythos漏洞61天，防守者修补战争
AI安全博弈：信息不对称下的漏洞披露策略
Mozilla曝光Mythos细节，Anthropic的安全策略失效？

Among other things, ChatGPT told them that there is no Iran war, Jared https://t.co/7tTjhZDK6b

backup.full_text:
How to master any skill fast:

- stop studying
- outline a project
- start building it
- hit a roadblock
- figure out how to overcome it
- repeat 4 and 5 for the rest of your life

Most people don't get past 1, the rest spiral into complacency after 4.
backup.summary: 学习方法论：停止学习→规划项目→开始构建→遇到障碍→解决问题→重复。通用效率建议，非AI特定。
angles: 掌握任何技能的5步法则，第1步最多人卡住
为什么学习者在第4步陷入舒适区
项目驱动学习vs传统学习的对比
